things.name: Skanderbeg Square
things.description: Central plaza honouring the Albanian national hero with an equestrian statue

things.name: National History Museum
things.description: Albania's largest museum with a remarkable mosaic facade and Albanian history

things.name: Bunk'Art 2
things.description: Cold War nuclear bunker under the Interior Ministry converted to a dark history museum

things.name: Et'hem Bey Mosque
things.description: Early 19th-century mosque with remarkable frescoes of trees and waterfalls

things.name: Pazari i Ri (New Bazaar)
things.description: Revitalised Ottoman market with colourful produce stalls and craft workshops

things.name: Pyramid of Tirana
things.description: Hoxha-era communist mausoleum now a youth cultural centre and concert venue

things.name: Dajti Mountain & Cable Car
things.description: Dajti Ekspres cable car to a forested mountain park above the city

things.name: National Art Gallery
things.description: Socialist Realist art and 20th-century Albanian paintings in a neoclassical building

things.name: Artificial Lake Park (Parku i Liqenit)
things.description: Large park and lake on the edge of the city, popular for evening walks

things.name: Bunk'Art 1
things.description: Enormous 5-storey communist nuclear bunker converted to an art and history space
